## [00:00 - 00:17]

Hey, the payments are too high. Yes, sir, compared to the enjoyment, the pride of owning the vehicle, the freedom from problems, and all the compliments you're sure to get, look, the payments are not really a problem. Would it help if we set it up so you don't have the first one due for maybe a month?
